title: Miniature Miniature World Studies
description: Eight independent miniature world studies for Tilt-Shift Miniature World, each testing a different visual angle within the same theme.
creative_direction: Eight independent images explore A Prompt Atlas theme for Tilt-Shift Miniature World, testing photorealism, physics-materials, style-transfer with GPT Image 2. through distinct studies that emphasize miniature-world, photorealism, frontier-creative-composition while keeping every image self-contained and ready for the queue.
